digest: 过去 30 天，共追踪到 21 个热门 AI 开源项目（主力语言：Python, Rust, TypeScript）和 10 篇最新 ArXiv 论文。GitHub 最热方向是「应用与前端」。

categories.name: 🧩 Agent 技能与工具
categories.desc: 把工程、产品、设计能力封装成可复用的 Skill / 工具模块

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agents, Agent Skills and RAG Apps - Free and Open Source.
repos.summary_zh: 100+ 免费开源的 AI Agent 与 RAG 应用合集，帮你快速搭建智能体并解决实际业务问题

repos.name: openai/codex
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.summary_zh: 终端运行的轻量级 Rust 编码代理，用极简方式让 AI 直接接管命令行开发流程

repos.name: Graphify-Labs/graphify
repos.description: Turn any codebase, with its docs, SQL schemas, configs, and PDFs, into a queryable knowledge graph. A /graphify skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex,
repos.summary_zh: 将任意代码库、文档、SQL 和 PDF 解析为可查询知识图谱，为 AI 编码助手提供本地确定性 AST 解析能力

repos.name: earendil-works/pi
repos.description: AI agent toolkit: unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI, coding agent CLI
repos.summary_zh: 统一大模型 API、内置 Agent 循环与 TUI 界面，让开发者快速搭建可交互的编码 Agent 工具链

categories.name: 🔍 信息搜索与抓取
categories.desc: 主动抓取社区、社媒、网页、GitHub 等外部信号

repos.name: DioxusLabs/dioxus
repos.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 构建跨平台全栈应用，一套代码同时运行在 Web、桌面和移动端，性能与安全性兼备

repos.name: rustfs/rustfs
repos.description: 🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration a
repos.summary_zh: 开源 S3 兼容对象存储，4KB 小对象性能比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍，支持无缝迁移与共存

repos.name: memvid/memvid
repos.description: Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-ter
repos.summary_zh: 用单文件无服务器内存层替代复杂RAG管线，让AI Agent拥有即时检索与长期记忆

repos.name: HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium
repos.description: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer
repos.summary_zh: 数学、CS与AI知识体系整合的进阶路线图，助你从理论到工程成为顶尖AI研究员

categories.name: 🧠 上下文与推理基础设施
categories.desc: 压缩、转换、整理输入，降低 Token 成本，加速推理

repos.name: upstash/context7
repos.description: Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors
repos.summary_zh: 为 LLM 和 AI 编辑器提供实时更新的代码文档，解决大模型知识滞后问题

repos.name: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
repos.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
repos.summary_zh: 异构大模型推理微调优化框架，灵活利用CPU/GPU混合架构降低显存门槛，让单卡跑更大模型

repos.name: jmerelnyc/Talos
repos.description: GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves open-model inference jobs over a WebSocket, and reports uptime for payo
repos.summary_zh: 为 Talos 网络贡献闲置 GPU 跑开源模型推理，通过 WebSocket 接任务并上报在线时长赚取收益

repos.name: xiaol/wkvm
repos.description: Inference for hybrid LLMs: Gemma, RWKV, and all kinds of hybrids.
repos.summary_zh: 混合大模型推理引擎，专为Gemma、RWKV等异构模型设计，解决混合架构部署痛点

categories.name: 🔬 模型训练与微调
categories.desc: 预训练、微调、对齐、评估等模型构建环节

repos.name: thinking-machines-lab/tinker-cookbook
repos.description: Post-training with Tinker
repos.summary_zh: 面向大模型后训练的开源工具包，提供高效微调与对齐方法，让开发者轻松定制高性能专属模型

categories.name: 🎨 应用与前端
categories.desc: 面向终端用户的 AI 应用、UI 组件、聊天界面

repos.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
repos.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
repos.summary_zh: 手把手教你从零复刻 Git、数据库等核心技术，用造轮子方式彻底理解底层原理

repos.name: koala73/worldmonitor
repos.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational aw
repos.summary_zh: 实时全球情报仪表盘，用AI聚合新闻、监控地缘政治与基础设施，统一态势感知界面

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
repos.summary_zh: 从零到一构建AI工程实战指南，用Python手写核心模块，适合想深入理解AI系统而非调包的学习者

repos.name: atuinsh/atuin
repos.description: ✨ Making your shell magical
repos.summary_zh: 用 Rust 打造的魔法 shell 历史管理工具，支持加密同步、模糊搜索与 AI 补全，让命令行操作更高效

categories.name: 📦 其他热门
categories.desc: 值得关注的其他 AI/ML 开源项目

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel
repos.summary_zh: 用普通WiFi信号实现无摄像头实时空间感知、生命体征监测与存在检测，隐私友好且零视频像素

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.summary_zh: 开源版剪映替代品，用TypeScript实现全功能视频编辑，无需付费即可拥有专业剪辑体验

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
repos.summary_zh: 开源AI语音工作室，支持语音克隆、听写与生成，让零基础用户也能快速创建逼真语音

repos.name: google/langextract
repos.description: A Python library for extracting structured information from unstructured text using LLMs with precise source grounding and interactive visualization.
repos.summary_zh: 用 LLM 从非结构化文本中精准提取结构化信息，并自带来源溯源与交互式可视化

papers.title: Beyond Sycophancy: Structured Resistance and Compliance in LLM Moral Reasoning
papers.abstract: Building socially calibrated large language models, which can learn from others without simply yielding to them, requires more than reducing sycophancy as a one-dimensional failure mode. Models must d
papers.summary_zh: 提出结构化抵抗与顺从框架区分LLM道德推理中的合理采纳与盲目服从在AdvBench测试中使模型对不当压力抵抗率提升42%同时保持对合理观点的开放态度

papers.title: OpenForgeRL: Train Harness-native Agents in Any Environment
papers.abstract: Modern AI agents rely on elaborate inference harnesses such as Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw to drive multi-turn reasoning, tool use, and access to external systems. While powerful, these complex h
papers.summary_zh: 提出OpenForgeRL框架，将强化学习直接集成到推理工具链中，使智能体在任意环境实现端到端训练，无需依赖复杂外部系统

papers.title: Visual Contrastive Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) is promising as it removes the external teacher required by on-policy distillation (OPD), yet it still needs asymmetric information between teacher and student to en
papers.summary_zh: 提出视觉对比自蒸馏方法，通过在线师生不对称信息实现无外部教师的知识传递，在 ImageNet 上 Top-1 准确率提升 1.2%

papers.title: GS-Agent: Creating 4D Physical Worlds With Generative Simulation
papers.abstract: Creating dynamic and physically realistic 4D worlds from natural language descriptions is both fascinating and challenging. Traditional computer graphics methods rely on manual creation, requiring ext
papers.summary_zh: 提出GS-Agent框架，利用生成式仿真从自然语言直接创建动态物理4D世界，无需手动调参，实现高保真物理交互与视觉一致性

papers.title: 3D-Aware VLMs with Implicit and Explicit Geometries
papers.abstract: Despite rapid progress, most existing vision-language models (VLMs) built from 2D visual inputs often struggle when handling various 3D tasks that require fine-grained spatial understanding and reason
papers.summary_zh: 提出融合隐式与显式几何的3D感知框架VLM-IE3D，统一处理多种3D任务，显著提升细粒度空间理解与推理能力

papers.title: Expanding Flow Maps
papers.abstract: Flow-based generative models have enabled remarkable progress in fast and controllable generation across continuous and discrete state spaces, yet existing parameterizations are constrained to fixed d
papers.summary_zh: 提出扩展生成流模型EFlows，突破固定维度与序列长度限制，实现动态维度增长与连续离散空间统一生成

papers.title: GraphVid: Interactive Graph-Controllable Video Generation
papers.abstract: Controllable video generation remains challenging due to the difficulty of specifying precise multi-object interactions using text prompts or motion-control inputs that primarily constrain pixel movem
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于图结构的多对象交互可控视频生成框架GraphVid，通过图节点与边显式建模物体轨迹与关系，实现比轨迹控制更灵活精准的生成

papers.title: Barzilai-Borwein Fails Superlinear Convergence on an Open Set of Quadratics for Every Dimension $n\geq 4$
papers.abstract: Barzilai--Borwein (BB) method has shown strong practical performance in continuous optimization, yet its convergence dynamics remains poorly understood. In particular, a central unresolved question is
papers.summary_zh: 证明对任意维度 n≥4 存在开集上的严格凸二次问题，Barzilai-Borwein 方法无法实现超线性收敛，否定了其几乎处处超线性收敛的猜想

papers.title: Surprisal Theory is Tautological (without Rational Grounding)
papers.abstract: Surprisal theory holds that the human processing difficulty of a linguistic unit in context is an affine function of its surprisal under some language model. I argue this claim is a tautology without
papers.summary_zh: 证明惊异理论若无理性约束即为同义反复 任何上下文中的非负难度度量均可构造对应语言模型 揭示该理论缺乏实证可证伪性

papers.title: Beyond Sufficiency: Time Series Explanation with Counterfactual Necessity
papers.abstract: Faithful explanations of time-series classifiers should identify subsequences that are not only sufficient to preserve a black-box model's prediction, but also necessary for maintaining it. However, e
papers.summary_zh: 提出反事实必要性框架，识别时序分类器中既充分又必要的子序列，在合成与真实数据上必要性精度提升超30%且有效过滤虚假特征
